final_orientation.name: Z-up flat
final_orientation.rationale: Keeps top surface in XY plane and preserves existing orientation; parameters fix symptoms.

special_notes: Enable ironing for top surface if slicer supports

actions.action: Increase retraction distance to 1.0 mm and speed to 45 mm/s
Lower nozzle temp to 205 °C and increase top layers to 5
actions.verification: Top surface Ra < 50 µm and no infill show-through

actions.action: Dry filament and verify extruder idler tension
actions.verification: No steam bubbles or inconsistent extrusion in first layer

test_print_plan.model: Stringing test tower + flat top surface coupon
test_print_plan.fallback: If stringing persists, reduce temp further to 200 °C and check for partial nozzle clog

evidence_links.claim: Top surface improved by more top layers
